headline: Assessing NRG Energy (NRG) Valuation After Q4 2025 Earnings Miss And Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: NRG Energy (NRG) is back in focus after its Q4 2025 earnings per share of $1.04 came in below analyst expectations of $1.19, a miss that coincided with a 4.20% share price decline. See our latest analysis for NRG Energy. Beyond the immediate earnings reaction, NRG Energy’s 1 month share price return of an 11.30% decline and year to date share price return of an 8.00% decline contrast with a very large 3 year total shareholder return of about 4x. This suggests long term momentum remains intact...
